calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2013 Off Calendar

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Continued To Dec-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth Hernandez in Propria Persona.

Ms. Hernandez stated that she is trying to get dual citizenship, that she needs to prove that her Parents were married prior to her being conceived, that there is an error on her Father's death certificate indicating that he was never married and that her Parents were never divorced. Ms. Hernandez also indicated that she has a copy of her Parent's marriage certificate and a copy of her Mother's death certificate listing her Mother as being a Widow. The Court explained to Ms. Hernandez this is not the proper form for what she needs and referred Ms. Hernandez to the instructions provided in the packet that was given to her (Ms. Hernandez) by the Department of Public Health. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage was continued to December 11, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Hernandez is to contact the Clerk to inform the Court as to the outcome of her efforts or if a further continuance is needed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
